---
name: Create-instructions
agent: Instruction Generator

---
Take the instructions below and generate and agent instructions .md file for it in the /docs directory.If a .md file is provided, use that,otherwise generate and appropriate file name based on the generated content.Make sure the instructions are concise and not too long.Make sure to update the AGENTS.md file to reference this new docs file.If no information is provided below,prompt the user to give the necessary details about the layer of architecture or coding standards to document.
